compositionPolicy.stack: Registration order is the deterministic portal-root visual and Escape order; asChild preserves the owning overlay slot identity.
compositionPolicy.escape: Only the top layer is considered; a non-dismissible top layer blocks dismissal behind it.
compositionPolicy.modal: Registered application roots outside the top environment-managed modal become inert while any such modal is active; externally managed modals remain in stack order without duplicating those effects.
compositionPolicy.scroll: Body styles, scrollbar compensation, and scroll coordinates restore exactly after the final modal closes.
compositionPolicy.nesting: Nested providers reuse the nearest manager so one Escape listener and one modal environment owner remain authoritative.
